description: Per-machine MQTT sync override for cnc-001 — used by the i3x-central middleware deploy (i-flow / Ignition / Highbyte). The i-flow RS-deploy picks `Sync-UNS-<machineId>` ahead of the global #shared.uns; this file pins cnc-001's middleware output to the live UNS broker 192.168.178.150:31883. Created because the stale shared-uns-alpha broker (192.168.178.110:21883) is decommissioned. Deliberately NOT mappingId '#shared.uns' so it never affects global #shared.uns resolution for other machines. Read-only for the .99 edge pipeline: the schema-publisher only consumes sources/opcua + profiles, never sync/.

attribute.description: Topic attribute name; matches smAttribute from nodeMappings

timestamp.description: Publish time of this message (ISO-8601 UTC)

Unit.description: Engineering unit. Empty string if dimensionless.

Definition.description: Human-readable description of what this attribute means

ValueQualityQualifier.description: OPC-UA-style quality — fresh samples default to 'good'

ValueProcessingQualifier.description: How the sample was selected within the publish interval
